reviews.comment:
Mucha demora en la carga de combustible por falta de personal.  El unico playero super amable y andaba a mil pero no daba abasto con tanto público para atender,cobrar. Necesitan reforzar atención de expedición de combustible urgente. Más aún los finde largos.

(Translated by Google)
There are significant delays at the gas station due to staff shortages. The only attendant was incredibly friendly and worked incredibly hard, but he couldn't keep up with the number of customers. They need to increase the number of people refueling urgently, especially on long weekends.

reviewReply.comment: se toma nota de su reclamo, intentaremos mejorar en ese aspecto, esperamos que en  su proxima visita esto de alla solucionado.-

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1bXVyV0tREAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and friendliness. Wide variety of products.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1bDZQSHhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy amable la atención. Además pudimos descansar en un area adyacente al Full, resguardada de viento, con mesitas y sombrillas. Los baños impecables

(Translated by Google)
The service was very friendly. We were also able to relax in an area adjacent to the hotel, sheltered from the wind, with tables and umbrellas. The bathrooms were spotless.

reviewReply.comment: Daniel, gracias por su comentario y calificación! nos alegra que halla tenido una buena experiencia en su paso por nuestra estación!

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención , cuentan con wifi , ya que en el pueblo hay mala señal , se acepta pago con débito ,crédito y demás medios electronicos

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, they have Wi-Fi, since the signal is poor in town, and they accept debit, credit, and other electronic payments.
